title: Kimco Realty: 4.1% Dividend, 50% Payout Ratio, Dividend Growth
text: Kimco Realty's fundamentals are improving. Strong FFO and dividend growth has transpired this year as the sector recovered.

title: Kimco Realty® Recognized as Nareit's 2022 Retail Leader in the Light for Outstanding Sustainability Practices
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, and a growing portfolio of mixed-use assets, today announced it has been awarded Nareit's Leader in the Light Award for the retail REIT sector, marking the third time the company has received this prestigious recognition for its sustainability initiatives.

title: These Were The Five Best- And Worst-Performing Real Estate Stocks In October 2022
text: Real estate stocks help investors insulate their portfolio against rising inflation.

title: Kimco Realty® Expands Presence in New York Market with Acquisition of Long Island Open-Air Grocery Anchored Portfolio
Shopping Center REITs: Supply/Demand Too Good To Ignore
text: For much of the last decade, pundits have been calling for the death of brick and mortar retail. The last few years proved out the benefit of retailers offering customers multiple channels and highlighted the indispensability of brick and mortar retail.
